subcodes.title: Words to Mabel MacCoy Irwin, spoken on 1911-09-18
subcodes.first_line: Give to them in America my loving greetings and my wish for their success. Tell them that if they would attain nearness to the Blessed Beauty they must love much, for love is everything.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @exhortations and counsels, @love of God
